info.title: Ark JSON-RPC API
info.description: Ark exposes a JSON-RPC 2.0 API over stdio and WebSocket transports. All CLI, Web dashboard, Desktop app, and remote client operations use this API. Authentication in hosted mode uses Bearer tokens (API key format: ark_<tenantId>_<secret>).

methods.name: agent/create
methods.description: Create or upsert an agent definition (YAML or structured).

methods.name: agent/delete
methods.description: Delete an agent definition.

methods.name: agent/list
methods.description: List all available agent definitions.

methods.name: agent/update
methods.description: Update an existing agent definition.

methods.name: compute/capabilities
methods.description: Return capability flags for a compute provider.

methods.name: compute/create
methods.description: Create a new compute target.

methods.name: compute/destroy
methods.description: Destroy a compute target and release its resources.

methods.name: compute/docker-action
methods.description: Stop or restart a Docker container on a compute target.

methods.name: compute/docker-logs
methods.description: Fetch logs from a Docker container on a compute target.

methods.name: compute/kill-process
methods.description: Kill a process on a compute target by PID.

methods.name: compute/list
methods.description: List compute targets. Pass `include` to filter concrete vs template rows.

methods.name: compute/provision
methods.description: Provision a compute target (boot VM, container, etc.).

methods.name: compute/read
methods.description: Read compute target details by name.

methods.name: compute/start-instance
methods.description: Start a stopped compute instance.

methods.name: compute/stop-instance
methods.description: Stop a running compute instance.

methods.name: compute/template/list
methods.description: List compute templates.

methods.name: config/get
methods.description: Read the current UI configuration (hotkeys, theme, mode).

methods.name: cost/export
methods.description: Export usage records.

methods.name: costs/read
methods.description: Read usage records with filters.

methods.name: costs/session
methods.description: Return cost breakdown for a specific session.

methods.name: daemon/status
methods.description: Return daemon component health (conductor, arkd, router).

methods.name: dashboard/summary
methods.description: Return dashboard summary (session counts, costs, compute health).

methods.name: flow/create
methods.description: Create a new flow definition.

methods.name: flow/delete
methods.description: Delete a flow definition.

methods.name: flow/list
methods.description: List all available flow definitions.

methods.name: flow/read
methods.description: Read a flow definition by name.

methods.name: fs/list-dir
methods.description: List entries in a filesystem directory.

methods.name: gate/approve
methods.description: Approve a pending gate to advance the flow.

methods.name: gate/reject
methods.description: Reject a pending gate (sends feedback to the agent via on-reject prompt).

methods.name: group/list
methods.description: List all session group names.

methods.name: history/list
methods.description: List imported session history.

methods.name: history/rebuild-fts
methods.description: Rebuild the FTS5 full-text search index.

methods.name: history/refresh-and-index
methods.description: Refresh and index the session history.

methods.name: input/read
methods.description: Fetch previously uploaded bytes by locator.

methods.name: input/upload
methods.description: Upload a file through the blob store. Returns an opaque locator.

methods.name: knowledge/export
methods.description: Export the knowledge graph to disk.

methods.name: knowledge/import
methods.description: Import the knowledge graph from disk.

methods.name: knowledge/index
methods.description: Index a codebase into the knowledge graph.

methods.name: knowledge/ingest
methods.description: Ingest files into the knowledge graph.

methods.name: knowledge/search
methods.description: Search the knowledge graph.

methods.name: knowledge/stats
methods.description: Return knowledge graph statistics.

methods.name: learning/add
methods.description: Record a new learning.

methods.name: learning/list
methods.description: List learned patterns observed across sessions.

methods.name: mcp/attach-by-dir
methods.description: Attach an MCP server to sessions in a project directory.

methods.name: mcp/detach-by-dir
methods.description: Detach an MCP server from a project directory.

methods.name: memory/add
methods.description: Add a memory.

methods.name: memory/forget
methods.description: Delete a specific memory.

methods.name: memory/list
methods.description: List memories.

methods.name: memory/recall
methods.description: Recall memories matching a query.

methods.name: message/markRead
methods.description: Mark all messages for a session as read.

methods.name: message/send
methods.description: Send a steering message to a running agent.

methods.name: metrics/snapshot
methods.description: Return current system metrics.

methods.name: model/list
methods.description: List all available model definitions.

methods.name: profile/create
methods.description: Create a new configuration profile.

methods.name: profile/delete
methods.description: Delete a configuration profile.

methods.name: profile/list
methods.description: List configuration profiles.

methods.name: recipe/delete
methods.description: Delete a recipe.

methods.name: recipe/list
methods.description: List all available recipes.

methods.name: repo-map/get
methods.description: Return the structured repository map for a directory.

methods.name: runtime/list
methods.description: List all available runtime definitions.

methods.name: runtime/read
methods.description: Read a runtime definition by name.

methods.name: schedule/create
methods.description: Create a scheduled or recurring session.

methods.name: schedule/delete
methods.description: Delete a schedule.

methods.name: schedule/disable
methods.description: Disable an active schedule.

methods.name: schedule/enable
methods.description: Enable a disabled schedule.

methods.name: schedule/list
methods.description: List scheduled sessions.

methods.name: search/global
methods.description: Global full-text search across all Claude project directories.

methods.name: search/sessions
methods.description: Full-text search across sessions.

methods.name: session/advance
methods.description: Approve a pending gate and advance to the next flow stage.

methods.name: session/archive
methods.description: Archive a completed session (hidden from default list).

methods.name: session/attach-command
methods.description: Return the tmux attach command for a session's pane.

methods.name: session/clone
methods.description: Clone a session with a new name.

methods.name: session/complete
methods.description: Mark a session as completed.

methods.name: session/conversation
methods.description: Return conversation turns (role+content pairs) for a session.

methods.name: session/delete
methods.description: Soft-delete a session.

methods.name: session/events
methods.description: Return events (status changes, stage transitions, errors) for a session.

methods.name: session/export-data
methods.description: Export a session's metadata and events as a portable snapshot.

methods.name: session/fork
methods.description: Fork a session into a child that shares the base worktree.

methods.name: session/import
methods.description: Import a previously exported session snapshot.

methods.name: session/interrupt
methods.description: Send Ctrl-C to the agent and inject a correction message.

methods.name: session/kill
methods.description: Forcefully terminate a session and clean up its tmux pane.

methods.name: session/list
methods.description: List sessions with optional filters (status, repo, group, parent).

methods.name: session/messages
methods.description: Return messages exchanged between the human and the agent.

methods.name: session/output
methods.description: Capture recent output from the agent's terminal pane.

methods.name: session/pause
methods.description: Pause a running session (snapshot-based pause where the runtime supports it).

methods.name: session/read
methods.description: Read full session details. Pass `include: ["events", "messages"]` to embed related records.

methods.name: session/recording
methods.description: Return the full recording of a session's terminal output.

methods.name: session/restore
methods.description: Restore an archived session.

methods.name: session/resume
methods.description: Resume a paused session from a snapshot.

methods.name: session/spawn
methods.description: Spawn a child session with a specific task, optionally overriding the agent.

methods.name: session/start
methods.description: Create a new session with an optional flow, agent, compute target, and input bag.

methods.name: session/stdio
methods.description: Return content of the session's stdio log file.

methods.name: session/stop
methods.description: Stop a running session (kills the agent process but keeps the tmux pane).

methods.name: session/transcript
methods.description: Return the raw JSON transcript produced by the agent.

methods.name: session/undelete
methods.description: Restore a soft-deleted session.

methods.name: session/unread-counts
methods.description: Return per-session counts of unread messages.

methods.name: skill/delete
methods.description: Delete a skill.

methods.name: skill/list
methods.description: List all available skills.

methods.name: skill/save
methods.description: Create or update a skill.

methods.name: status/get
methods.description: Return server status (total sessions by status).

methods.name: todo/add
methods.description: Add a todo item to a session.

methods.name: todo/delete
methods.description: Delete a todo item.

methods.name: todo/list
methods.description: List todos for a session.

methods.name: todo/toggle
methods.description: Toggle a todo item's done state.

methods.name: tools/list
methods.description: List configured MCP tools, commands, and skills.

methods.name: verify/run
methods.description: Run verification scripts for a session.

methods.name: worktree/cleanup
methods.description: Clean up stale worktrees.

methods.name: worktree/create-pr
methods.description: Push and open a GitHub pull request from a worktree.

methods.name: worktree/diff
methods.description: Return git diff stat for a session's worktree.

methods.name: worktree/finish
methods.description: Merge a worktree back to its base branch.

methods.name: worktree/list
methods.description: List active worktrees (sessions with a branch checked out).
